pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ jiào __. wǒ shì __.
english: Hello, my name is __. I am __.

pinyin: nǐ jiào shén me míng zì?

variation: Use 美国/英国/西班牙/中国.

pinyin: wǒ huì shuō yì diǎn zhōng wén.
english: I can speak a little Chinese.

english: I would like a cup of tea.
variation: Change tea to water or coffee.

pinyin: qǐng què rèn huì yì shí jiān.
wǒ shāo hòu huí fù nǐ.

pinyin: kě yǐ yǒu zhé kòu ma?
wǒ jué de zhè ge hěn hǎo.

chinese: 因为今天很忙，所以我不能去。
pinyin: yīn wèi jīn tiān hěn máng, suǒ yǐ wǒ bù néng qù.
english: Because I am busy today, I cannot go.

pinyin: wǒ men xū yào gǎi biàn jì huà.
